data.body: Confirmed live 2026-07-03 against production Jira REB: acli fetch returns all 628 issues and the real dry-run pass produces a sane 248-update plan with ZERO orphaned-driven actions, yet reconcile-check reports all 627 bindings orphaned. This isolates the defect to reconcile-check's ticket.json loader (the live-acting pass is unaffected). Compiled ticket source confirmed: .cache.json['state'] (keys ticket_id/status/ticket_type/tags/...).
